race.description: Elders Rural Country Boosted Maiden Plate
race.comment: ZEALANDS PRINCESS (11) closed off strongly third-up with an encouraging second over 1000m at Orange. That form looks good enough for this. HARRY (3) slashing run first-up when he produced slick closing splits to finish a narrow fourth over 900m at Wellington. Will take a lot from that hit-out and gets a much better set-up today. Hard to hold lout. KINGDOM HEART (7) fifth-up for this and prefer back to the 1000m. Run down late with a game fourth over 1100m at this track. Can feature with even luck from the sticky draw. PROPHET'S LASS (9) Brett Robb trained three-year-old filly by Farnan from Prophet's Thumb on debut. Recent trial winner at Dubbo and ticks a few boxes with the claim. Respect. CORKY (1) fitter now and can sneak into the minor money.
